nodes.label: Miskolc IIS Hybrid Indoor Positioning Dataset (WiFi/BT/Magnetometer)
nodes.source_file: raw/Toth and Tamas - 2016 - Miskolc IIS hybrid IPS Dataset for hybrid indoor .pdf | My Library | Zotero.pdf
nodes.rationale: Multi-technology dataset (WLAN, Bluetooth, Magnetometer) in a 3-story reinforced concrete building enables benchmark comparison of hybrid indoor positioning algorithms that cannot be evaluated with single-modality datasets.
